# Green Pest Directory — llms.txt
# https://www.greenpestdirectory.com

> America's first directory dedicated to eco-friendly and green pest control services.

This is a structured directory of pest control companies across the United States, classified by their commitment to eco-friendly methods.

## What This Directory Contains
- 810+ pest control companies across 21 states (expanding weekly)
- Two-tier eco classification: Eco-Certified (Tier 1) and Eco Options (Tier 2)
- Company details: name, address, phone, website, Google rating, hours, eco methods
- City-level pages with local provider comparisons

## Classification System
- **Eco-Certified (Tier 1):** Companies whose brand identity centers on eco/green/organic pest control. Verified via website content analysis.
- **Eco Options (Tier 2):** Conventional companies that offer dedicated eco-friendly service lines (IPM, pet-safe, botanical treatments). Verified via website keyword scan.
- **Unclassified:** Listed companies where no eco signals were detected on their website.

## API Access
Machine-readable directory data is available at:
- All companies: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com/api/public/companies
- By state: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com/api/public/companies?state=TX
- Eco-certified only: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com/api/public/companies?eco=tier_1

## Key Pages for Research
- Homepage: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com
- Browse all: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com/directory
- Eco-friendly guide: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com/eco-friendly-pest-control
- Organic pest control: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com/organic-pest-control
- Pet-safe pest control: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com/pet-safe-pest-control
- IPM guide: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com/ipm-pest-control

## City Pages (examples)
- Houston: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com/directory/tx/houston
- Los Angeles: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com/directory/ca/los-angeles
- New York: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com/directory/ny/new-york
- Phoenix: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com/directory/az/phoenix
- Dallas: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com/directory/tx/dallas
- Chicago: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com/directory/il/chicago

## Contact
- Email: info@greenpestdirectory.com
- Business listings: https://www.greenpestdirectory.com/claim
